chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-5234 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection No.19 2. For order on CMA No.22377/2022 (Exemption) 3. For hearing of main case 28.8.2025 None present for the petitioner -------------------------------- This is an old petition of 2022, which is almost three years ago. It was last taken up on 09.9.2022, which is almost three years ago, when learned counsel for the petitioner sought time to prepare his brief. Today, despite lapse of almost three years, none present for the petitioner without intimation. The petitioner has failed to pursue this petition diligently over last three years. It appears that the petitioner has no interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed application. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
